title: Pictogram Consistency in Graphical Abstracts: Good vs Poor Combinations

L2: Panel A shows consistent pictograms (similar color, size, design style)
Panel B shows poor combination with inconsistent pictogram styles
L3: Figure 2 from the Ten Simple Rules paper demonstrating pictogram consistency. Panel A shows pictograms with similar overall appearance (color, size, design), while Panel B shows a poor combination of inconsistent styles. Key design principle for effective graphical abstracts. CC BY 4.0.
